chat.def: 聊天、閒談、閒聊的人的人物、閒聊地 (聊)
chat.col: chat show, online chat, small chat, have a chat
chat.ex: We had a long chat about our summer vacation plans tonight.

chateau.def: (法)城堡、豪宅、莊園的人物 (單數)
chateau.ex: They spent their holiday in a beautiful French chateau.

chatelaine.def: 女莊園主、(掛於腰間的)掛鏈的人物 (單數)
chatelaine.ex: The original chatelaine of the manor was a very powerful lady.

chatellany.ex: The knight was in charge of a small and remote chatellany.

chattel.def: 動產、奴隸的人的人物 (單數)
chattel.ex: They packed all their goods and chattels into the small van.

chatter.def: 喋喋不休、(牙)咯咯發聲、鳴叫、喋喋不休的人、叫聲地 (喋)
chatter.ex: The monkeys' loud chatter could be heard throughout forest.

chatterbox.def: 愛說話的人、喋喋不休的人人物 (單數)
chatterbox.ex: My younger sister is a real chatterbox and never stops talking.

chattering.def: 喋喋不休的、咯咯作響的人 (或物) (喋)
chattering.ex: He stood in the cold water with his teeth chattering loudly.

chatty.def: 愛聊天的、閒談的人人物 (聊)
chatty.ex: Our chatty neighbor always has some interesting news for us.

chauffeur.def: (私營)司機、開車、擔任司機的人物、開車地 (司機)
chauffeur.ex: The wealthy man has a private chauffeur to drive him around.

chauvinism.def: 沙文主義、盲目的愛國心人物 (單數)
chauvinism.ex: She criticized the male chauvinism within the organization.

chauvinist.def: 沙文主義的、盲目的人物 (單數)
chauvinist.ex: He was accused of being a very narrow-minded chauvinist.

chauvinistic.def: 沙文主義的、盲目的愛國的人的人物
chauvinistic.ex: The speech was full of loud and chauvinistic attitudes.

cheap.def: 便宜的、低劣的、卑鄙的、廉價的人、便宜地 (賤)
cheap.col: dirt cheap (極便宜), cheap thrill, talk is cheap (空口無憑)
cheap.ex: I managed to find a very cheap flight to Paris last week.

cheapen.def: 減價、貶低、降職、減價的人的人、貶低地 (貶)
cheapen.ex: Discounting the luxury item would cheapen the entire brand.

cheaply.ex: He bought the old house cheaply and renovated it himself.

cheat.def: 欺騙、作弊、騙子、作弊的人、欺騙地 (騙)
cheat.col: cheat on exams, tax cheat, cheat death
cheat.ex: He was caught trying to cheat on his final math exam.

cheating.ex: Exam cheating is a very serious offense at our local school.

check.def: 檢查、支票、阻止、格子花紋、檢驗、校對的人物、檢查地 (驗)
check.col: double check, blank check, baggage check, check-in, keep in check (克制)
check.ex: You should always double check your work before handing it in.

checkbook/chequerbook.ex: She realized she had left her blank checkbook at the office.

checked.def: 過格子花紋的、受抑制的人的人 (或物) (格)
checked.ex: He wore a blue and white checked shirt to the office party.

checker/chequer.def: 棋盤、格子、查核者、使成格子、格子的人人物 (格)
checker/chequer.ex: The floor of the kitchen has a classic black and white checker.

checkered/chequered.def: 多變的、波折的、格子的的人的人 (或物) (折)
checkered/chequered.ex: The politician has had a very long and checkered career.

checking.def: 查核、檢驗、校對的人 (或物) (核)
checking.ex: You need a checking account to pay your bills online tonight.

checklist.def: 清單、檢查清單的人物 (單數)
checklist.ex: I've ticked all the items on my holiday packing checklist.

checkmate.def: (棋)將死、完全挫敗、使陷於死地的人物 (死)
checkmate.ex: The grandmaster delivered a brilliant checkmate in ten moves.

checkout.def: 結帳處、結帳、檢驗、結帳的人 (或物) (結)
checkout.ex: The line at the express checkout was surprisingly short today.

checkpoint.ex: All cars were stopped at the military security checkpoint.

checkup/check-up.def: 體檢、檢查、核對的人 (或物) (檢)
checkup/check-up.ex: I have to go to the local hospital for my annual medical checkup.
